heading: Omitted
label: 675 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which prohibited use of funds authorized to be expended or advanced pursuant to former for the payment of agents’ or attorneys’ fees, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 12, 1953, ch. 406, § 267 Stat. 540section 674 of this title
